data.body: Epic cold-stall-chalk write-time op batching: rewrote epic to corrected scope (reconciler B3 dropped; idempotency/deferred-push already shipped; B1/B2/B4 + optional cascade). Epic plan-review PASS, claimed RebarBotNava. Children B1=890d-4733-1c88-4976 B2=6386-fa1d-d6b5-49ae B4=66ff-5dfb-bb36-4a57. B1 plan-review PASS, claimed, implemented batch_stage_and_commit + batch_write_and_push in src/rebar/_store/event_append.py (all-or-nothing rollback; generalized _recover_from_unmerged); tests/unit/test_store_batch_write.py 6 cases; make lint/typecheck/test GREEN; pushed Gerrit change #459. B2/B4 plan-review BLOCKED structurally on B1 not yet in origin/main + valid design refinements.
